case_title: MARLTON MANOR, LTD. PARTNERSHIP vs. MEREDITH, SYLVIAN et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MEREDITH, SYLVIAN
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARLTON MANOR, LTD. PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT MEREDITH, SYLVIAN
